threads.subject: Leave Balance Inquiry
threads.lastMessage: Your leave balances have been updated. Please check your portal.

messages.text: Hi, I noticed my SIL balance seems off. I should have 5 days but it shows 3.75. Can you check?
Good morning Juan! Let me check your leave ledger.
I see the issue — the January carry-over wasn't applied yet. We'll correct it today.
Your leave balances have been updated. Please check your portal.

threads.subject: COE Request
threads.lastMessage: Your COE is ready for pickup at the HR office.

messages.text: Good day! I need a Certificate of Employment for a bank loan application. Can you issue one with my current salary stated?
Hi Juan! Sure, we can process that. Please fill out the COE Request form in the Documents tab. Processing takes 3–5 business days.
Done! I just submitted the form. Thank you!
Your COE is ready for pickup at the HR office.

threads.subject: Expense Reimbursement Follow-Up
threads.lastMessage: The reimbursement has been processed and will reflect in your next payslip.

messages.text: Hi, I submitted my meal expense claim (EXP-003) on April 5 but haven't seen the reimbursement yet. Can you check the status?
Hi Juan! The claim is currently pending manager approval. Once approved, finance will process it within 3–5 days.
The reimbursement has been processed and will reflect in your next payslip.
